_schema_note: net_worth values marked method='mobile_app_verified' are read from MISA's mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' screen (Tổng có − Tổng nợ) — currently the MOST complete source. method='dashboard_verified' is the website's /wallets/totaldashboard API, which is MISSING ~400M: ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED 2026-06-23 — the savings book 'tikcop 5 week' (active, matures 2026-10-13, rate 7.5%) IS present in the website's /wallets/savings response but with currentAmount stuck at 0 (a MISA website data bug, confirmed via mobile app screenshot showing the correct balance 401,917,738). This silently undercounts /wallets/saving/summary and therefore /wallets/totaldashboard by the same amount. No client-side fix exists — cross-check with mobile app when in doubt. method='reconstructed' values are manually summed from account/transaction APIs and inherit the same gap.

VERIFIED against mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' + 'Quản lý sổ tiết kiệm' screens (screenshots 2026-06-23 10:19 and 10:27). Every line item cross-checked against website API data and matched exactly EXCEPT savings_account. ROOT CAUSE FOUND: website's /wallets/savings DOES return the wallet 'tikcop 5 week' (401,917,738 ₫, active, matures 2026-10-13, 7.5%) but with currentAmount=0 — a confirmed MISA website bug, not a fetch/code error. The 4 real active savings books are: vcb 1 month (503,977,053) + tịkcop 1 week (30,105,411) + tikcop 1m (102,087,367) + tikcop 5 week (401,917,738) = 1,038,087,569, matching mobile exactly. (Side note: this also retroactively confirms the 26/05 report's 'tikcop 1 week: 401,917,738, maturity 2026-10-13' entry was the same book mislabeled — it should have been called 'tikcop 5 week'; the real, smaller 'tịkcop 1 week' 30.1M book is a separate, distinct savings account that existed the whole time.)
